command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT 'client_users' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM client_users WHERE clientId IN (4650005,4650006,4650007,4650008,4650009,4650010,4650011,4650012,4680005,4680006,4680007,4680008,4680009,4680010,4680011,4680012,4680013,4680014,4680015) UNION ALL SELECT 'client_invitations', COUNT(*) FROM client_invitations WHERE clientId IN (4650005,4650006,4650007,4650008,4650009,4650010,4650011,4650012,4680005,4680006,4680007,4680008,4680009,4680010,4680011,4680012,4680013,4680014,4680015) UNION ALL SELECT 'client_project_assignments', COUNT(*) FROM client_project_assignments WHERE clientId IN (4650005,4650006,4650007,4650008,4650009,4650010,4650011,4650012,4680005,4680006,4680007,4680008,4680009,4680010,4680011,4680012,4680013,4680014,4680015);
